description_long: This is an open, medium-sized cardboard box with four flaps spread outward, revealing a spacious interior. The exterior surface is a light brown, slightly worn cardboard with visible creases and subtle paw print markings scattered across several panels, suggesting it may have been used for pet-related deliveries. One side features a printed barcode, while another displays two upward-pointing black arrows, indicating the correct orientation for handling. The box's texture appears matte and slightly rough, consistent with standard corrugated cardboard. The interior is empty, and the flaps are fully open, making the box suitable for holding or transporting various items.
description: A light brown, open cardboard box with outward flaps, paw print markings, a barcode, and handling arrows, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barcode and paw prints on the lower panel, with all four flaps open.
description_view_1: Side view with more visible paw prints on the front panel, no barcode or arrows present.
description_view_2: Rear view with only paw prints visible, no barcode or arrows, and all flaps open.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring two black upward arrows, no barcode, and open flaps.
